summary: Milestone lz-tdd@0.0.3: Phases 15-20 complete; Phase 20 evals RAN (EVL-01 + D-09 + EVL-02) and are committed + honestly reported. User inserted Phase 21 (Applied RED Eval in Real OSS Repos, multi-dimensional, 3-arm) to be BUILT + RUN before milestone close, mirroring lz-refactor Phase 13/14. Phase 21 is scoped in ROADMAP but NOT yet discussed/planned/scaffolded. This handoff is for a FRESH session to run /gsd-core:discuss-phase 21 --analyze --auto --chain.

completed_tasks.name: EVL-01 trigger forward+reciprocal + D-09 house-idiom widen (2026-07-21)
EVL-02 coaching-prose behavior benchmark: 60 coach runs + 10 judges + merge/verify + aggregate + Pass@k, filled EVAL-RESULTS.md
Unbiased from-scratch reviewer (PASS-WITH-CAVEATS): caught phrase-set vocabulary-inflation; adopted substance-only headline (with_skill 0.97 vs baseline 0.87)
Inserted + scoped Phase 21 in ROADMAP (apply-based, 3-arm, 9-dimension, competitor deferred); STATE current_phase->21

remaining_tasks.name: /gsd-core:discuss-phase 21 --analyze --auto --chain (scope OSS targets + arm mechanics + dimension gates; --chain into plan-phase)
plan-phase 21 (formalize EVL-03 requirement; instrument-first build plan for the apply harness)
execute-phase 21: build the apply harness (reuse lz-refactor run-e2e.mjs / tabulate-mechanical.mjs / oracle-reviewer), zero-spend selfcheck
GATED metered run: 3 own-skill arms first (no_skill/with_skill/invoke_skill); mattpocock:tdd competitor a LATER contingent round; grade 9 dimensions + Pass@k + unbiased reviewer
verify/secure/validate/extract-learnings for Phase 21, then /gsd-complete-milestone lz-tdd@0.0.3 (manual archival per @-scoped version)

blockers.description: Any Phase 21 metered run (claude -p / apply fan-out) needs explicit fresh user approval before executing (D-11 HARD GATE / eval-run-approval-gate). Not technical.
blockers.workaround: Build + zero-spend selfcheck without approval; halt at the run gate and present it.

human_actions_pending.action: In discuss-phase 21: decide the real OSS TS target repo(s) + how many red-test-shaped tasks, dimension gate-vs-report split, and confirm with_skill auto-trigger mechanics.
human_actions_pending.context: These are HIGH-IMPACT scoping choices; --auto will auto-lock them -- see the --auto trap constraint below.

human_actions_pending.action: Approve the Phase 21 metered run when it reaches the run gate.
human_actions_pending.context: Large apply fan-out + judges + oracle-reviewer; a fresh session with headroom + spend budget is the right place (the org monthly spend cap was hit once during the Phase-20 EVL-02 run).

decisions.decision: Phase 21 = apply-based eval in REAL OSS repos with short human prompts, NOT coaching-prose over synthetic snippets.
decisions.rationale: User feedback 2026-07-22; the coaching-prose EVL-02 over-weighted house vocabulary. Mirrors lz-refactor Phase 13/14.

decisions.decision: Three own-skill arms: no_skill / with_skill (auto-trigger, natural prompt) / invoke_skill (force-invoke /lz-tdd:lz-red). with_skill vs invoke_skill surfaces trigger gap.
decisions.rationale: User emphasized force-invoke vs with_skill; Phase-20 'with_skill' was actually force-invoke (read SKILL.md from disk) -- must separate, run the real plugin via claude -p for auto-trigger.

decisions.decision: mattpocock-skills:tdd competitor arm DEFERRED to a later contingent round, after our own lift is measured.
decisions.rationale: User 2026-07-22. Standalone-confirmed 2026-07-22 (no hard sibling dep) so it IS viable, but broader-scope (full red->green loop + interactive seam-confirm) -- note the scope mismatch.

decisions.decision: Grade on 9 lift dimensions; where a vocabulary proxy is used, report SUBSTANCE-ONLY as the headline.
decisions.rationale: Phase-20 EVL-02 lesson: phrase-set graders measure vocabulary not substance; the unbiased reviewer caught a 3x inflation.

decisions.decision: Milestone close DEFERRED until Phase 21 completes (user held before close).
decisions.rationale: User wants the stronger applied eval as the shipping record.

next_action: Run /gsd-core:discuss-phase 21 --analyze --auto --chain. Feed it the Phase 21 design already locked in ROADMAP (apply-based; 3 arms; deferred/standalone-confirmed competitor; 9 dimensions; reuse the lz-refactor apply harness at .claude/skills/lz-refactor-workspace/) so --auto inherits GOOD values rather than inventing. Treat the HIGH-IMPACT scoping gray areas (which OSS repo(s), dimension gates, competitor timing) per the --auto trap constraint: auto-lock only where evidence-backed; record any genuinely-uncertain choice as UNRESOLVED for a human, do NOT self-approve. No metered run until the run gate + fresh approval.
context_notes: Read these first: .planning/ROADMAP.md Phase 21 section (full design + success criteria), .claude/skills/lz-red-workspace/EVAL-RESULTS.md (the Phase-20 EVL-02 record + reviewer verdict), and CLAUDE.md memories lz-skill-eval-design-apply-based-multidim + lz-red-evl02-substance-vs-vocabulary + eval02-subagent-orchestration-mechanic + eval-run-approval-gate + gsd-discuss-phase-auto trap. Harness template to reuse: .claude/skills/lz-refactor-workspace/{run-e2e.mjs, tabulate-mechanical.mjs, selfcheck-*.mjs} + oracle/oracle-reviewer for book authenticity (DST-04). Orchestration mechanics for the eventual run (from Phase 20): ponytail leaks into in-session Agent subagents -> add an explicit normal-mode directive; env-var PONYTAIL lock does NOT reach in-session subagents; spend-limit-killed agents resume via SendMessage(agentId) with context intact; run in SMALL waves (user flagged too-many-in-parallel at 24); sandbox drive to a git-ignored work/ dir = ground-truth nodrive. Working tree clean at HEAD 18522d2 on branch gsd/lz-tdd-0.0.3-lz-red (169+ unpushed commits, not pushed). --auto+--chain means discuss will auto-decide gray areas AND chain into plan-phase; the design is pre-locked in ROADMAP to steer it.
